g.text: EviSI-Eval v0.7 — 14 LLM Agents · Joint Card · Repair Loop · Deterministic Scoring
SECTION 1 — JOINT EXTRACTION · 8 LLM calls / sample
4 LLM calls · Source-only · never sees any translation
4 LLM calls · sees source_card + ref · auxiliary, NOT gold
Same source sentence flows through every stage · En→Zh SI
"Dr. Li's team at MIT published a study on
AFTER PHASE 5–8 (reference aligned → Joint Card frozen)
AFTER PHASE 9–10 (SI matched against Joint Card)
SI: "Dr. Li's MIT team published 18.4 MWh..."
Python positional zip of source + reference arrays · once per sample, shared by every SI system
artifact_hash = sha256( json.dumps({k:v for k,v in items if k!="metadata"}, sort_keys=True) )
SECTION 3 — SI MATCHING · 6 LLM calls / system + RUNNER REPAIR LOOP
each LLM phase runs: call → validate → if fail → schema_repair (×2) → fallback
↑ max 2 schema_repair attempts, then deterministic fallback → failures.jsonl
One Anchor — from LLM match to score contribution
8 LLM/sample + 6 LLM/system + up to 12 repair calls · deterministic, reproducible
